# Welcome to the IBM TechXchange Community
![](https://higherlogicdownload.s3.amazonaws.com/IMWUC/dfd5be75-7434-44d5-beed-41626462dd64/UploadedImages/Home_page_banner.png)
**Missed IBM TechXchange Dev Day: Virtual Agents? On-demand viewing is available[here](https://ibmtechxchange-virtual-agents.bemyapp.com/)**
[](https://community.ibm.com/community/user/participate/welcome-corner)
[](https://community.ibm.com/community/user/participate/resources)
[ ](https://community.ibm.com/community/user/participate/blogging-in-the-community)
[](https://community.ibm.com/community/user/participate/community-leaders)

## Why IBM TechXchange Community
## 0k
#### Members
Consists of a diverse group of individuals, including developers, engineers, IT experts, and tech enthusiasts.
## 0k
#### Discussions
Engage in discussions on new technologies, troubleshooting issues, products, and best practices.
## 0
#### Countries
The international nature of the community enhances collaboration, cultural exchange, and the sharing of best practices.
IBM Champions
User Groups
## We love to celebrate advocacy year round!
IBM Champions are at the pinnacle of expertise and advocacy: These individuals are exceptional in their commitment to paying forward their knowledge and experiences. Get to know our advocates better!
[Watch the video](https://video.ibm.com/recorded/134098888)
![](https://higherlogicdownload.s3.amazonaws.com/IMWUC/dfd5be75-7434-44d5-beed-41626462dd64/UploadedImages/HLDS0824/IBM-TechXchange-Tuesday-08725_3.jpg)
## Meet. Network. Learn. Share.
User Groups are a volunteer-run group of customers, IBMers, and business partners, actively working with IBM solutions and are passionate about learning and sharing information about their solutions with other members. We’ve made it easier for you to find a User Group that’s right for you.
_[Meet. Network. Learn. Share.](https://www.ibm.com/community/user-groups/)_
![](https://higherlogicdownload.s3.amazonaws.com/IMWUC/dfd5be75-7434-44d5-beed-41626462dd64/UploadedImages/HLDS0824/1000001325_1__1.jpg)
